Clean energy concept, wind turbine on hill

instructions_to_main_agent: Theme Implementation: Set 'dark' class on the html element by default. Use the color palette defined above.
Font Usage: Import Chivo and Inter from Google Fonts. Use Chivo for all Headings (h1-h3) and Inter for body text.
Layout: Use Bento Grid layouts for the landing page. Use dense, bordered tables/grids for dashboards.
Components: Use Shadcn UI components. customize the border-radius to 'rounded-sm' (2px) for a sharper, industrial look.
Charts: Use Recharts with the defined chart colors. Ensure high contrast against the dark background.
Icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width should be 1.5px or 2px.
Glassmorphism: Use the defined glass gradients for floating elements like the navbar and toast notifications.
Data-Testid: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs). Format: 'kebab-case-role'.
No Transparent Backgrounds: Ensure all dropdowns, modals, and headers have a solid or blurred background color (never pure transparent).
universal_guidelines: Do not use centered layouts for main content; prefer left-aligned or asymmetrical.
Use layered design with z-index for depth.
No generic transitions (transition: all). Animate specific properties.
Use generous spacing (p-8+) for marketing pages.
